gate_land_reference.title: feat(g-conv.7): ADR-0220 swarm coordination discipline
gate_land_reference.note: Four gates D1–D4 first on main

events.analysis: D4 check_escape_hatch emitted event when SWARM_ESCAPE_ID missing — refusal path, not successful bare git --no-verify bypass. Source: intentional probe/skeptic (same second as D2 probe).
D2 acquire_branch_lock denied second session; event is denied hijack attempt. Session names skeptic-d2-* prove intentional adversarial/skeptic probe, not production main conflict.

residual_coverage_notes.gap: branch-claim only enforced inside gac-worktree.sh claim — bare `git branch/checkout -b work/x` does not call lock
bare `git push --no-verify` skips hooks; agent path uses swarm-git fail-closed

disposition.reason: All events classified gate_interception after gate land; no coverage_gap_bypass proven. Residual bare-git gaps tracked as follow-up, not freeze.
